---
title: "modelling caterpillars"
output: html_document
---
```{r}
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
```


```{r}
caterpillar_data <- read.csv(here("data", "clean data", "caterpillar_data.csv"))

caterpillar_data <- caterpillar_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(hatch_date))

caterpillar_data$pupal_treatment <- as.factor(caterpillar_data$pupal_treatment)
caterpillar_data$hatch_date <- as.Date(caterpillar_data$hatch_date)

caterpillar_data <- caterpillar_data %>%
  mutate(julian_hatch_date = yday(hatch_date)) %>%
  mutate(clutchID = str_split(clutchID, "\\.", simplify = TRUE)[,3])

caterpillar_data$clutchID <- as.factor(caterpillar_data$clutchID)

```

```{r}
lm1 <- lmer(julian_hatch_date ~ size_01 * pupal_treatment + (1|clutchID), data = caterpillar_data)
summary(lm1)
```
